decisions.decision: Dashboard link restored to Sidebar with grid icon
decisions.rationale: User previously removed it, now re-requested it back

decisions.decision: Sidebar entry animation: CSS @keyframes sidebarEnter, suppressed via sidebarNoAnim class
decisions.rationale: Keyframe fires on mount; document.referrer check determines whether to suppress

decisions.decision: Sidebar entry animation skip: document.referrer check in useState() initializer
decisions.rationale: Simpler and more reliable than sessionStorage; browser sets referrer automatically on all same-origin navigations

decisions.decision: Sidebar exit animation reuses isLeaving prop already present on BugReportPage and SprintPage
decisions.rationale: Both pages already call setIsLeaving(true) in handleBackToDashboard; no new state needed

decisions.decision: Sidebar resize transition: transition property moved from mobile media query to base .sidebar
decisions.rationale: Transition only in media query = no animation when crossing breakpoint; base placement fixes this
Required to center logo on mobile when hamburger present, without JS

decisions.decision: Logo click triggers exit animation then navigates to /dashboard via onLogoClick prop
decisions.rationale: Allows pages to run fadeOutUp before navigating; cleaner than intercepting anchor

decisions.decision: Bug report docx: dual donut charts side by side + stats table
decisions.rationale: User requested docx match page visual

decisions.decision: Sprint docx: colored card table per sprint, no donut charts
decisions.rationale: User explicitly rejected charts for sprint — card rows match sprint page visual

next_action: Commit the 4 uncommitted sidebar animation files, restart frontend container, then UAT all sidebar navigation transitions in browser.
context_notes: All 5 project phases complete (v1.0). Post-v1 UI polish. This session added: Dashboard link to Sidebar, sidebar enter animation (sidebarEnter keyframe, skipped when navigating between sidebar pages via document.referrer), sidebar exit animation (sidebarLeaving class triggered by isLeaving prop), smooth resize breakpoint transition. Key implementation: Sidebar.jsx useState() initializer reads document.referrer synchronously — if referrer is /bug-report or /sprint, skipAnim=true and sidebarNoAnim CSS class suppresses the keyframe. isLeaving is passed from both BugReportPage and SprintPage to Sidebar.
